questions.question_text: Answer the following questions CO Mapping a What is heating value of a fuel? Differentiate between lower heating value and higher heating value. b What are the harmful constituents of photochemical smog? c SI engines operate at stoichiometric air fuel ratio. Is the statement correct? Give reasons in support of your answer. d What is equivalence ratio of a fuel? What is its significance in combustion process? e How turbulence in SI engines is different from swirl in CI engines? f List some non-exhaust emissions from a vehicle. g State two advantages of Exhaust Gas Recirculation. h State two limitations of thermal converter.
Discuss briefly different factors affecting flame speed in SI engine.

Butane enters a combustion chamber at 27°C at a rate of 0.05 kg/min where it is mixed and burned with air that enters the combustion chamber. Determine the mass flow rate of air and air-fuel ratio for: Combustion with stoichiometric air-fuel ratio Combustion with 10% less air
Discuss briefly different stages of combustion of CI engine.
Compare knocking in SI engine and CI engine. Also briefly discuss the factors affecting knocking in SI and CI engine.
Discuss briefly different causes of unburned hydrocarbon emissions.
Explain briefly how different types of emissions in SI and CI engines are affected by air-fuel ratio.
Explain the working of catalytic converter with the help of a suitable diagram. Write its advantages and limitations.
What are the different alternative fuels used to reduce emissions. Discuss any one fuel in detail along with its advantages and limitations.
